name: Saddlebag Chili
recipeIngredient: 8 Fresh whole Jalapeno peppers, seeded and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the bacon until crispy. Remove from pan and set aside.
2. In a large pot, sauté the onions and bell peppers in the bacon grease with half of the minced garlic over medium heat until softened.
3. Add the brisket to the pot and pour in the beer and whiskey. Stir to coat the meat.
4. Reduce heat to medium-high and pour in the remaining ingredients: cooked onion mixture, tomato sauce, Worcestershire sauce, cumin, jalapenos, tabasco sauce, salt, and pepper.
5. Bring the chili to a boil, then reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 1 hour, stirring frequently.
6. After 1 hour, add all remaining ingredients except the last tablespoon of paprika. Stir well.
7. Continue cooking on medium-low until thickened, about 10-15 minutes. Stir constantly during this final cooking period.
8. Finally, stir in the last tablespoon of paprika and cook for an additional minute to ensure even distribution.
